topic: I worked the graveyard shift at a 24-hour gas station in the middle of nowhere
There is a recording on my answering machine from someone I have never met
The new house came with a baby monitor in the attic that we did not install
There is a door in my basement that wasn't there last week
My brother went missing for six hours when we were kids and came back wrong
My night shift at the call center kept getting calls from a number that didn't exist
I went hiking alone and found a campsite that had been waiting for me
I found a cassette tape labeled DO NOT PLAY in my late uncle's attic
We moved into a house that was suspiciously cheap and now I know why
I have a daughter who is not in any of the family photos but she is here
I deliver food at night and I have learned which addresses to never go to twice
My smart doorbell keeps recording someone standing in our hallway
There is a video on my drone's SD card that I never recorded
I was a security guard at an empty hospital that was scheduled for demolition
I remembered a babysitter we had when I was seven that no one else in my family remembers
My GPS keeps telling me to take an exit that does not exist
I found my grandfather's old camcorder and the last recording is from after his death
My grandmother's house has a room that everyone in the family pretends doesn't exist
I have dreamed of the same house my entire life. I found it on Google Street View last week and it is real.
There was an empty house at the end of my street that the adults all whispered about
My imaginary friend from when I was four has started visiting my own daughter
My dashcam keeps saving footage of roads I have never driven
I was the only employee on the night shift at a small motel off Route 6
The man my mother is dating is wearing my father's wedding ring
My new neighbor knows things about me he should not know
My phone's location history shows me visiting an abandoned house every night at 3AM. I have never been there.
The Polaroid camera I inherited only takes pictures of one specific room
My router logs show my dead father's laptop connecting to my network every night
I took a wrong turn on a back road and ended up in the same town twice
My sleep tracker has forty-three nights of missing data over two years. I have no memory of those nights.
My smart home devices started responding to a voice that is not mine. The voice knows my full name.
My smart lock app shows someone entering my house every night while I sleep
I drove through a town that was not on any map I owned
My truck broke down on a highway with no other cars for three hours, then one came
I have a twin I did not know about until last summer
My birth certificate was signed by a doctor who died two years before I was born
My electricity bill is for a house that was demolished in nineteen eighty seven
Night shift at a self storage facility on Old Lapeer Road where unit two seventeen had a tenant nobody had ever seen
The previous tenant of my apartment left a calendar marked he comes by every Tuesday at nine
I have hiked the same three mile trail every October for nine years and this year there was a fourth mile marker
I bought a box of unmarked VHS tapes at an estate sale for two dollars
I bought a used phone online and someone is still receiving messages on it
My elderly neighbor's voice assistant kept asking her questions she did not understand
I worked at a remote weather station and something started leaving footprints in the snow
My daughter's kindergarten drawings all show a tall man in a hallway we have never lived in
The same grey sedan has been at my grocery store every visit for six months
There is a room in my house that only appears in the mirror
My dog barks at the exact same spot in the kitchen at the exact same time every night
My doorbell camera records a child knocking on my door every night at three seventeen but no one is ever there when I check
My house key fits a stranger's front door three blocks away from where I live
I keep finding receipts in my jacket pockets for places I have never been
My security camera records 47 seconds of footage I never saw happen every night at 2:13 AM
My smoke detector only beeps when no one is home
My phone call log shows a three minute call every Tuesday at three fourteen AM to a number I do not recognize
I found a roll of undeveloped film in my dead grandmother's drawer and the photos were taken last month
Every wedding photo on our wall shows a fifth person standing behind us
My mailbox keeps getting letters addressed to people who never lived at my address
My wife does not appear in any of our wedding photos. No one else finds this strange.
My ceiling has a water stain in the shape of my own face that appeared the day I moved in
My calendar has a recurring Friday meeting I did not create at an address that no longer exists
My cat brings me small objects every morning from a basement that was bricked over in nineteen seventy four
Our family Christmas card from nineteen ninety eight has gained an extra child every December since
My dentist found a tooth I do not remember growing and the root goes deeper than any of my others
My dishwasher only finishes its cycle when I am asleep and stops if I stay up to watch
My doctor's office has been calling to remind me about appointments I do not remember scheduling
My front door keeps getting locked from the inside while I am at work
My downstairs neighbor sweeps his floor every night at two thirty AM and his apartment has been empty for nine months
My building's elevator stops at floor thirteen every Thursday at seven PM but there is no thirteenth floor
